name: ap-invoice-review-claude-ocr
description: Self-serve AP invoice MCPB with a Claude OCR image-result Go/No-Go smoke test.
long_description: Milestone 0 validates whether Claude Desktop can OCR MCPB tool-result image content before the AP review flow is migrated away from legacy sidecars. OCR smoke results are written only to _runs/<run_id>/ocr_results. Never uses Airtable, Google Drive, or external ERP/SaaS writes.

tools.name: ap_invoice_ocr_smoke_test
tools.description: Return a fixed invoice PNG as MCP image content so Claude Desktop can perform OCR.

tools.name: ap_invoice_submit_ocr_smoke_test_result
tools.description: Validate Claude's OCR smoke result and save it under _runs/<run_id>/ocr_results.

tools.name: ap_invoice_setup_demo_workspace
tools.description: Pre-Go blocked: legacy sidecar demo export is disabled in the Claude OCR gate package.

tools.name: ap_invoice_list_demo_cases
tools.description: Pre-Go blocked: legacy demo case listing is disabled until no-sidecar OCR review is implemented.

tools.name: ap_invoice_preview_folder
tools.description: Pre-Go blocked: folder preview would expose legacy sidecar facts and is disabled.

tools.name: ap_invoice_review_folder
tools.description: Pre-Go blocked: AP review is disabled until Claude OCR Go and no-sidecar implementation.

tools.name: ap_invoice_review_demo_case
tools.description: Pre-Go blocked: legacy sidecar demo review is disabled in the Claude OCR gate package.

tools.name: ap_invoice_explain_exception
tools.description: Pre-Go blocked: exception explanation is disabled until OCR review results exist.

tools.name: ap_invoice_build_approval_brief
tools.description: Pre-Go blocked: approval briefs are disabled until OCR review results exist.

tools.name: review_ap_demo_case
tools.description: Pre-Go blocked compatibility tool: legacy sidecar review is disabled.

tools.name: review_ap_invoice_packet
tools.description: Pre-Go blocked compatibility tool: packet review is disabled until Claude OCR implementation.

tools.name: explain_ap_exception
tools.description: Pre-Go blocked compatibility tool: explanations require OCR review results.

tools.name: build_ap_approval_brief
tools.description: Pre-Go blocked compatibility tool: approval briefs require OCR review results.

tools.name: create_ap_review_case
tools.description: Pre-Go blocked advanced tool: review cases are disabled in the OCR gate package.

tools.name: upload_ap_document
tools.description: Pre-Go blocked advanced tool: document upload is disabled in the OCR gate package.

tools.name: start_ap_invoice_review
tools.description: Pre-Go blocked advanced tool: deterministic sidecar review is disabled.

tools.name: get_ap_invoice_review_result
tools.description: Pre-Go blocked advanced tool: review results require OCR review implementation.
